title: Course: COSC 374 - Introduction to Bioprogramming
description: Course involves students doing projects with computer programming in a language of their choice. No background in genetics or biology is assumed.
prerequisites_text: COSC 373 completed with a grade of C or higher

COSC 374 - Introduction to Bioprogramming

Offered: As needed

Description: Course involves students doing projects with computer programming in a language of their choice. No background in genetics or biology is assumed.
